creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
I think we’re the last ones to visit @keturahreserve, but better late than never, right? 😃 If you haven’t been, take this as a sign. 

Keturah Reserve is a luxury real estate development in Nad Al Sheeba. A lot of construction ongoing in the area. At the moment, there’s a Matcha Padel Club, a nice selection of cafes and restaurants, and a super IG-worthy pavement lined with olive trees! Definitely a community to watch out for! 

No entrance fee.
Save for your next Dubai adventure! 

#KeturahReserve #ladyandhersweetescapes #visitUAE #dubaiblogger #uaeblogger #travelblogger #pinayblogger #mydubai #dubai #visitdubai #DubaiReels #DubaiDestinations

transcription.text: Passed lines couldn't ever hold me down, lost love is sweeter when it's finally found I've got the strangest feeling
